remarks: Rare opportunity to rent a historic Stamford condo offering over 1,200 square feet of living space with a wood-burning fireplace, dedicated home office potential, flexible guest accommodations, and beautiful architectural character throughout. Perfect for professionals, remote workers, or couples seeking significantly more space and personality than a typical apartment. Conveniently located near downtown Stamford, shopping, dining, and major commuter routes, this unique home combines historic charm with modern functionality.
